user_query: I'm planning a trip to France next month and I want to know the railway period during my stay. Can you provide me with the railway period for the date 1654470000000? Also, I'm interested in exploring different house plants. Could you give me some information about the available plant species and their descriptions?

TaskList.description: Retrieve the railway period information for the specified date (1654470000000) in France.
Gather information about various house plant species and their descriptions.
